underlying_goal: Systematically fix DevOps security and reliability issues in a recommendations-service repo based on an audit report
friction_detail: CircleCI service containers don't support env var expansion, causing the credential externalization to break e2e tests; also the ajv/minimatch override fixes required multiple attempts.
brief_summary: User walked through a DevOps audit report fixing ~11 issues (health checks, Dockerfile security, credential hardcoding, SHA pinning, lint breakage) one by one, and Claude successfully resolved nearly all of them with minor friction around CircleCI limitations and npm override debugging.
